trans-unit.source: Limit reached. You can only use characters in this field.

Change Category in change transactions category form

trans-unit.source: A pending transaction is a payment that has been authorized but has not been processed. For instance, a transaction that is still waiting for the merchant to process it or a transaction requiring overnight processing because it was made after the cutoff time of the financial institution.

A pending transaction is a payment that has been authorized but has not been processed. For instance, a transaction that is still waiting for the merchant to process it or a transaction requiring overnight processing because it was made after the cutoff time of the financial institution.
trans-unit.note: Description inside a tooltip, describing what a Pending Transaction is

trans-unit.source: The limits are in pending state, and will be active once they are approved

x.equiv-text: { hostRef.limitBound.period, select, transactional-limits-bound {...} daily {...} weekly {...} monthly {...} quarterly {...} yearly {...} other {...}}

trans-unit.source: {VAR_SELECT, select, transactional-limits-bound {Per transaction} daily {Daily} weekly {Weekly} monthly {Monthly} quarterly {Quarterly} yearly {Yearly} other {} }
When setting limits, ‘per transaction’ should be your smallest value, with ‘yearly’ the largest.
Try to reload the page or contact the system administrator.
'Zero limits' means no transaction can be performed
